basic_details.organization_name: Advanced Centre for Treatment, Research and Education in Cancer (ACTREC)
basic_details.short_information: ACTREC Recruitment 2026 OUT! The Advanced Centre for Treatment, Research and Education in Cancer (ACTREC) has released 2 vacancies for the Research Assistant post under Advt No. ACTREC/ADVT-137/2026. Interested and eligible candidates with B.Sc. qualification along with DMLT/CMLT can participate in the walk-in interview on 29 July 2026. Selected candidates will be appointed on a contract basis with a monthly salary of Rs. 20,000/- to Rs. 23,000/-. Candidates can check the complete details regarding the ACTREC Recruitment 2026, including eligibility criteria, salary, selection process, and walk

qualification.details: Research Assistant: B.SC. with DMLT/CMLT. Experience with manual immunohistochemistry, and/or genomic methods such as RNA-ISH, PCR, FISH etc. Experience with healthcare project management / Clinical Trial management, including basic understanding of ethics and Good Clinical Practices, good handle over standard tools such as Word, Excel, Google Calendar, Meeting platforms like Zoom, Microsoft teams, Google Meet, etc. and be fluent in English Communication.

salary_details.details: Research Assistant: Rs. 20,000/- to 23,000/- per month

all_official_links.label: Download ACTREC Research Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ACTREC Research Assistant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the ACTREC Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download ACTREC Research Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ACTREC Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
ACTREC Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Research Assistant: B.SC. with DMLT/CMLT. Experience with manual immunohistochemistry, and/or genomic methods such as RNA-ISH, PCR, FISH etc. Experience with healthcare project management / Clinical Trial management, including basic understanding of ethics and Good Clinical Practices, good handle over standard tools such as Word, Excel, Google Calendar, Meeting platforms like Zoom, Microsoft teams, Google Meet, etc. and be fluent in English Communication.

content_sections.heading: ACTREC Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Research Assistant: Rs. 20,000/- to 23,000/- per month

content_sections.heading: ACTREC Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
ACTREC Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for ACTREC Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: ACTREC Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ACTREC Research Assistant posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Research Assistant posts at ACTREC is scheduled for 29th July 2026. Candidates should report within the specified time slot.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Assistant position?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification for the Research Assistant post is a B.Sc. degree with DMLT/CMLT. Additional experience in specific research methods and project management is also preferred.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Research Assistant position announced by ACTREC.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Research Assistant position will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 20,000/- to Rs. 23,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is a Walk-in Interview. Interested and eligible candidates need to attend the interview in person.

faq.question: Q6. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at Meeting Room-I, 3rd Floor, Khanolkar Shodhika, ACTREC, Kharghar, Navi Mumbai - 410210, Maharashtra.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry their recent CV, original and Xerox copies of all certificates, experience certificates, testimonials, a recent passport-size photograph, and ID proof (preferably Aadhaar Card).

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. What is the reporting time for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The reporting time for the walk-in interview is from 10:00 a.m. to 10:30 a.m. on 29th July 2026.

faq.question: Q10. What type of job is this?
faq.answer: This is a Contract job position at the Advanced Centre for Treatment, Research and Education in Cancer (ACTREC).
